description: A designed graphic with a dark brick-wall background. A white instant-photo frame holds a booking-style portrait of a man with short dark hair in a blue collared shirt, captioned 'MULTIPLE SEXUAL ASSAULTS & BURGLARIES' in handwriting-style text. Below is a 'Worst of the Worst' logo with a 'Portland' label and an ICE logo.
